name: @oacp/console
description: OACP Console — live agent graph, message flow, and delegation topology

scripts.test:e2e:feed: playwright test e2e/console-message-feed.spec.ts e2e/console-message-feed-scroll.spec.ts e2e/console-message-feed-virtual.spec.ts e2e/console-message-feed-day50.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:catalog: playwright test e2e/console-agent-catalog.spec.ts e2e/console-agent-catalog-filters.spec.ts e2e/console-agent-catalog-suite.spec.ts e2e/console-agent-search.spec.ts e2e/console-fleet-grouping.spec.ts e2e/console-role-taxonomy.spec.ts e2e/console-cross-panel-linking.spec.ts e2e/console-agent-detail-drawer.spec.ts e2e/console-agent-pins.spec.ts e2e/console-virtualized-agents.spec.ts
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
